allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw '.taskmaster/scripts/apply-task9-grilling.ps1'; $pattern = '\(?s\)\\$details_9_7 = @''\(.+?\)''@'; $m = [regex]::Match\($content, $pattern\); $body = $m.Groups[1].Value; $atSign = \([regex]::Matches\($body, "@"\)\).Count; $singleQuote = \([regex]::Matches\($body, "'"\)\).Count; Write-Output \("@ count: $atSign, single-quote count: $singleQuote"\))

PowerShell(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in ['src/resound/classifiers/__init__.py','src/resound/classifiers/openrouter.py','src/resound/gateway/__init__.py','src/resound/prompts/__init__.py','src/resound/prompts/classify.py']]; Write-Host 'OK'")

PowerShell(python -c "import ast; files=['src/resound/classifiers/__init__.py','src/resound/classifiers/openrouter.py','src/resound/gateway/__init__.py','src/resound/prompts/__init__.py','src/resound/prompts/classify.py']; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) for f in files]; print\('OK'\)")
